rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion To Set Aside Restraining Order And Declaration
rulings.Rulings: This motion was filed with the Court on May 15, 2017. The hearing on the motion is continued to Thursday, June 8, 2017 at 2:00 p.m. Any party wishing to contest this tentative ruling by appearing at the scheduled hearing must so advise the courtroom clerk (415-551-3702) and opposing parties no later than 4:00 p.m. Tuesday, May 16, 2017.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF LAURA LYNN COLE
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition To Establish Estates Ownership To Property For Order Directing Transfer To Estate For Double Damages And For Attorneys Fees
rulings.Rulings: continued to june 28, 2017. still no proposed order delivered to the probate examiner. Local Rule 14.6.A. states proposed orders shall be delivered 2 weeks before the hearing date. new deadline for submitting the order is june 14. hard copy is required. no faxed or emailed orders are accepted.
